texto: The person who has trust in divine justice is neither upset when treated unfairly, nor seeks his justice; on the contrary, he accepts the false accusations as if they were true, and does not try to convince others that he has been slandered; instead he asks to be forgiven...
autor: Elder Paisios of the Holy Mountain
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Elder Paisios of the Holy Mountain: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a espiritualidade. O trecho “The person who has trust in divine justice is neither upset when treated unfairly, nor seeks his …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que espiritualidade, christian, elder-paisios pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de elder-paisios e greece.
